'''''Omicron 5''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttle]] which escorted [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] ''[[Degathem]]'' and ''[[Anterab]]'' to deliver research supplies to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] [[XQ6 Platform]] ''[[Research]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Omicron 5'' fought with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] attacking the freighters during the [[Arms Race]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
